member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.Factory.FlameEngineFactory
member.summary: Factory to create new flame engine instance.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Factory.FlameEngineFactory.FlameEngineInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets Flame engine instance.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.FileHandler.IFileHandler
member.summary: This object is responsible to handle files.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.FileHandler.IFileHandler.ReadAll(System.String)
member.summary: Read file contents and returns the content as string.
member.param: Full path of the file.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.FuseManagerService
member.summary: Fuse service implemenation.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.FuseManagerService.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets fileHandler.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper
member.summary: Helper class to print the debug messages for debug purposes only. The static nature of this class might cause an issue with mDUT and iDut.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintUpdatedFusesToConsoleForDebug(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print the updated fuses data to console.
member.param: The dictionary of fuses from single tag.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintUpdatedFuseTagsToConsoleForDebug(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print all the fuse data to console.
member.param: The dictionary of fuses from single tag.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintDebugMessage(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print the debug message.
member.param: The message to be printed.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintFuseDataDetails(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FuseManagerService.ValueDetails},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print the fuse map data to log.
member.param: The fuse map data.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintParsedHeapItems(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print the Parsed Item Details for debug.
member.param: The parsed Item Details.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintDebugToTosConsole(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print the debug message to TOS Console GUI. Define LIVE_DEBUG in csproj to enable this helper.
member.param: The message to print.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.IFuseManagerService
member.summary: Fuse service class.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IFuseManagerService.GetVirtualFuseHandler(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the handler for virtual fuse for a specific namespace. This handler is required to perform actions related to fuses. Test methods and user code will need to get this handler on Verify(). Through this handler user will be able to read, write and genreate virtual fuses descriptors (HCS) and data (FDS).
member.param: The fuses namespace defined in VirtualFuseConfig .json file.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Virtual fuse handler for requested namespace.
member.exception: Specified namespace does not exists in storage.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
var U1VirtualFuseHandler = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IFuseManagerService>.Service.GetVirtualFuseHandler("U1", this.SessionContext)/;

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.CalculationMode
member.summary: This will decide the way generating descriptors and data (HCS and FDS) will behave.

member.name: F:Prime.FuseManagerService.CalculationMode.IGNORE_STORED_DATA
member.summary: Will ignore all stored data, and calculate the descriptors and data (HCS and FDS) using the provided fuses in the API.

member.name: F:Prime.FuseManagerService.CalculationMode.USE_STORED_DATA_FROM_TAGS
member.summary: Will take into account fuses from the provided tags to calculate the descriptors and data (HCS and FDS), along with the provided fuses in the API.

member.name: F:Prime.FuseManagerService.CalculationMode.USE_ALL_STORED_DATA
member.summary: Will take into account all the stored fuses under namespace to calculate the descriptors and data (HCS and FDS), along with the provided fuses in the API.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler
member.summary: Fuse handler class. Through this handler user will be able to read, write and generate virtual fuses descriptors (HCS) and data (FDS).

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.StoreVirtualFuse(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: This method stores the provided fuses and values under the given tag.
member.param: Fuses names and values in binary.
Tag to store the fuses under.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.StoreVirtualFuse(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: This method stores the provided fuses and values under the given tag.
member.param: Fuses names and values in binary.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.ReadVirtualFusesForSpecificTag(System.String)
member.summary: This method will read the fuses data from the given tag. Enable bits defined in the FusesWithEnableBit will be included.
member.param: Tag to pull fuses from.
member.returns: Dictionary of fuse name to value.
member.exception: The specified tag does not exists.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.ReadVirtualFuseWithoutEnableBitsForSpecificTag(System.String)
member.summary: This method will read the fuses data from the given tag. Enable bits defined in the FusesWithEnableBit will not be included.
member.param: Tag to pull fuses from.
member.returns: Dictionary of fuse name to value.
member.exception: The specified tag does not exists.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.TryReadVirtualFusesForSpecificTag(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}@)
member.summary: This method will try to read the fuses data from the given tag. Enable bits defined in the FusesWithEnableBit will be included.
member.param: Tag to pull fuses from.
The dictionary of fuse name to value. This parameter will be null if there's any error.
member.returns: True if the tag exists in the service storage.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.ReadAllVirtualFuse
member.summary: This method will read all the fuses. Enable bits defined in the FusesWithEnableBit will be included.
member.returns: Dictionary of fuse name to value.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.ReadAllVirtualFuseWithoutEnableBits
member.summary: This method will read all the fuses. Enable bits defined in the FusesWithEnableBit will not be included.
member.returns: Dictionary of fuse name to value.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.GenerateVirtualFuseWithoutStoredData(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates the virtual fuse descriptor and data (HCS and FDS) without using stored data.
member.param: Fuses to take into account when generating the descriptor and data.
member.returns: Virtual Fuse Data structure containing HCS and FDS.
member.exception: Empty dictionary being sent for generation.
FLAME encounters an error when generating the descriptor and data.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.GenerateVirtualFuseWithTaggedData(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates the virtual fuse descriptor and data (HCS and FDS) using stored data in the service specified by the tag.
member.param: Tags of the data to be obtained from service storage.
Extra fuses to take into account when generating the descriptor and data.
member.returns: Virtual Fuse Data structure containing HCS and FDS.
member.exception: No fuses are stored in the service and empty dictionary is being sent for generation.
FLAME encounters an error when generating the descriptor and data.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.GenerateVirtualFuseWithTaggedData(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String})
member.summary: Generates the virtual fuse descriptor and data (HCS an FDS) using stored data in the service specified by the tag.
member.param: Tags of the data to be obtained from service storage.
member.returns: Virtual Fuse Data structure containing HCS and FDS.
member.exception: No fuses are being tagged with the specified tag.
FLAME encounters an error when generating the descriptor and data.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.GenerateVirtualFuseWithAllData(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates the virtual fuse descriptor and data (HCS and FDS) using all stored data in the service.
member.param: Extra fuses to take into account when generating the descriptor and data.
member.returns: Virtual Fuse Data structure containing HCS and FDS.
member.exception: No fuses are stored in the service and empty dictionary is being sent for generation.
FLAME encounters an error when generating the descriptor and data.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.GenerateVirtualFuseWithAllData
member.summary: Generates the virtual fuse descriptor and data (HCS and FDS) using all stored data in the service.
member.returns: Virtual Fuse Data structure containing HCS and FDS.
member.exception: No fuses are stored in the service.
FLAME encounters an error when generating the descriptor and data.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.GenerateVirtualFuseDffString
member.summary: This method generates the 'dff' string that contains all fuses info under this namespace. String format is as follow: "TAG1^FUSE11:VAL&FUSE12:VAL|TAG2^FUSE21:VAL&FUSE22:VAL..".
member.returns: 'dff' string that represents this fuses namespace.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.UpdateFusesDataFromDffString(System.String)
member.summary: This method update fuses database from DFF string. String format is as follow: "TAG1^FUSE11:VAL&FUSE12:VAL|TAG2^FUSE21:VAL&FUSE22:VAL...".
member.param: fuses string from dff.
member.exception: Value from DFF is not formatted correctly.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.ResetVirtualFuseForTag(System.String)
member.summary: This method will delete all the fuses stored under the given tag in the service.
member.param: The fuse tag to reset. Leave it empty if you want to reset all.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.ResetAllVirtualFuse
member.summary: This method will delete all the fuses stored in the service.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.AddFuseToTag(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Tag new fuse to a new or existing tag. If the tag hasn't exist previously, new tag will be created.
member.param: The fuse name to be added to the tag.
The tag name that the fuse to be added to.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.RemoveFuseFromTag(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Remove the specified fuse name from the tag. Specified tag exists.
member.param: The fuse name to be removed from the tag.
The tag name that the fuse to be added to.
member.exception: No tags are stored in the service.
Specified fuse name doesn't exists under the specified tag.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.SaveCurrentFuseStorage
member.summary: Save current fuses into the latched storage.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.SaveCurrentFuseStorageForTag(System.String)
member.summary: Save current fuses into latched storage for specific tag.
member.param: The tag of the fuses to be saved.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.RestoreSavedFuses
member.summary: Restore fuses from latched storage and remove current fuses.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.RestoreSavedFusesForTag(System.String)
member.summary: Restore fuses from latched storage and remove current fuses.
member.param: The tag of the fuses to be restored.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.TagExistsInNamespace(System.String)
member.summary: This method will determine if the specified tag exists in the current namespace.
member.param: Fuse tag to be verified.
member.returns: True means tag exists and contains data; false means tag doesn't exists in namespace.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseHandler.SetHandlerToGenerateFuseDataMap
member.summary: This method will set the handler to generate fuse map data together with virtual fuse data (HCS and FDS) at generation phase.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapGeneratorProxy
member.summary: Proxy interface to FLAME HeapGenerator.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapGeneratorProxy.ParsedHeapItemDetails
member.summary: Gets or sets the parsed heap item details.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapGeneratorProxy.GenerateHeapInfo(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generate the heap info.
member.param: The fuse data to be generated.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapInfoProxy
member.summary: Proxy to HeapOutputInfo from FLAME. This proxy is the boundary layer to FLAME's Heap Object.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapInfoProxy.HeapString
member.summary: Gets or sets the heap string proxy for FLAME.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapInfoProxy.DescriptorPointer
member.summary: Gets or sets the descriptor pointer proxy for FLAME.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapInfoProxy.DescriptorSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the descriptor size proxy for FLAME.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapInfoProxy.DataPointer
member.summary: Gets or sets the data pointer proxy for FLAME.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapInfoProxy.FuseDataSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the fuse data size proxy for FLAME.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapInfoProxy.HeapMapData
member.summary: Gets or sets the heap map proxy for FLAME.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy
member.summary: Proxy to HeapParserItemDetails from FLAME. This proxy is the boundary layer to FLAME's HeapParserItemDetails.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy.ParsedHeapItemType
member.summary: Gets the item type.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy.Summary
member.summary: Gets the summary.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy.Label
member.summary: Gets the label.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the correlation id.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy.BitPositionOnHeap
member.summary: Gets the bit position on heap.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy.BitWidth
member.summary: Gets the bit width.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.Internal.IHeapParserItemDetailsProxy.BinaryValue
member.summary: Gets the binary value.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseData
member.summary: Data structure to hold the generated virtual fuses data.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseData.HeapControlSection
member.summary: Gets the HCS string for virtual fuses.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseData.FuseDataSection
member.summary: Gets the FDS string for virtual fuses.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseFlameEngine
member.summary: Interface for Flame fuse engine that is used in Prime fuse service to generate the fuses.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseFlameEngine.Initialize(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This function should perform all the needed initialization on Flame fuse engine, in order to be used in execution time.
member.param: Flame key to get chassis, dummy descriptor and meta data.
The path to the flame file that defines the Flame key details.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.IVirtualFuseFlameEngine.GenerateDescriptorAndData(System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This function will be used in execution time to generate descriptor and data (HCS and FDS) for a given list of fuses.
member.param: Generate the fuse map data together.
Fuses to be used to generate the descriptor and data.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Pair that represents descriptor and ata (HCS and FDS).

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.Proxies.HeapGeneratorProxy.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: FLAME Key to the Die.
Path to FLAME VF file.
Make the generator parse the heap string for descriptor information.
The session context of the operation.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.HeapInfoProxy.#ctor(Intel.FlameVF.HeapGenerator.Models.HeapOutputInfo)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Heap info from flame.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile
member.summary: This class represents the structure of VirtualFuse .json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.VirtualFuseConfigs
member.summary: Gets or sets list of virtual fuses configurations.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.VirtualFuseConfig
member.summary: This class represents virtual fuse config section.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.VirtualFuseConfig.Namespaces
member.summary: Gets or sets list of namespace under one config section.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.VirtualFuseConfig.FlameKey
member.summary: Gets or sets Flame id or key that will be used to pull the matching configs from Flame network path. This key will allow the service to locate: chassis, dummy descriptor and metadata file from Flame.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.VirtualFuseConfig.FlameFile
member.summary: Gets or sets Flame file path that will be used to in conjunction with the FlameKey.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.VirtualFuseConfig.FusesWithEnableBit
member.summary: Gets or sets list of enable bit mapping per fuse. This allows the user to rely on the service to automatically update enable bits of specific fuses.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.FusesWithEnableBit
member.summary: Class that represents single mapping of fuse to enable bit fuse.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.FusesWithEnableBit.FuseName
member.summary: Gets or sets the fuse name to map.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.FusesWithEnableBit.EnableBitFuseName
member.summary: Gets or sets the enable bit fuse name, to map into.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.FusesWithEnableBit.EnableBinaryValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to write to enable bit fuse when data is written to the fuse name.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.ValueDetails
member.summary: Details on the value.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.ValueDetails.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the segment.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.ValueDetails.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the start bit position in the string.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.ValueDetails.End
member.summary: Gets or sets the end bit position in the string.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuse
member.summary: Base class of virtual fuse information.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuse.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the string value.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuse.ValueDetails
member.summary: Gets or sets the details of the value.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseData
member.summary: Data structure to hold the generated virtual fuses data.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseFlameEngine
member.summary: Flame engine implementation.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseFlameEngine.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the FileHandler.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseFlameEngine.HeapGenerator
member.summary: Gets or sets FlameVf HeapGenerator Interface for unit test injection.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseHandler
member.summary: Fuse handler.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseHandler.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Handler is responsible for the flame engine.
member.param: The namespace for this handler.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseHandler.FlameVirtualFuseEngine
member.summary: Gets flame engine.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData
member.summary: Class for virtual fuse namespace data that will be stored in SharedStorage. During exectuion, VirtualFuseHandler will acces this class (using SharedStorage) to read and write fuses data. This class is still missing:- - HCS/FDS Fuse Size. - SplitDieHierarchyIndex.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.#ctor(Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseConfigFile.VirtualFuseConfig,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Constructor for virtual fuse namespace that will be stored in SharedStorage.
member.param: hi1.
hi2.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Parameterless constructor is required for SharedStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.NamespaceName
member.summary: Gets or sets namespace name.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.FlameKey
member.summary: Gets or sets FlameKey that will be used to pull the matching data of: chassis_version, dummy_descriptor and metadata.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.FlameFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets Flame file that will be used for the namespace.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.EnableBitFuses
member.summary: Gets or sets EnableBitFuses.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.EnableBitFuse
member.summary: EnableBitFuse.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.EnableBitFuse.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: fuse name.
enable bit fuse name.
enable fuse binary value.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.EnableBitFuse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Parameterless constructor is required for SharedStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.EnableBitFuse.FuseName
member.summary: Gets or sets fuseName.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.EnableBitFuse.EnableBitFuseName
member.summary: Gets or sets EnableBitFuseName.

member.name: P:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseNamespaceData.EnableBitFuse.EnableBinaryValue
member.summary: Gets or sets EnableBinaryValue.

member.name: T:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseSharedStorageInfo
member.summary: Class that continas info about shared storage keys.

member.name: M:Prime.FuseManagerService.VirtualFuseSharedStorageInfo.GetNamespaceSharedStorageKey(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the shared storage key to pull name space data from.
member.param: fuse name space.
member.returns: shared storage key to pull name space data from.
